name: Root Beer Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Root beer (do not use diet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon and onion in a medium saucepan until the bacon is brown and crisp.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the saucepan. Heat until boiling, then reduce heat and simmer, stirring often, until slightly thickened, about 20 minutes.
